commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds a disabled-by-default Xiaomi MiMo Balance provider that fetches prepaid balance, displays Paid/Granted breakdowns, shares MiMo cookie auth, and wires app UI, CLI metadata, docs, widget exclusions, and parser tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the docs use `--provider mimobalance`, while CLI parsing only accepts descriptor names and aliases and the branch registers `mimo-balance` plus `xiaomi-mimo-balance`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can align the MiMo Balance CLI docs/alias and add coverage; maintainer review is still needed for the shared auth-provider contract.

target.title: feat: Add Xiaomi MiMo prepaid balance provider
target.body:
Adds a new .mimobalance provider (Alibaba-style separate provider pattern) that shows MiMo prepaid API balance with Paid/Granted breakdown.

- Fetches /api/v1/balance endpoint for cashBalance and giftBalance
- Shows total balance in menubar (e.g. $9.60)
- Menu card displays Paid/Granted breakdown like DeepSeek
- Uses cookie-based auth, reusing MiMo cookie importer
- Separate provider so users can enable balance independently from token plan
target.author: adriansimionov

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
